name: microsoft-teams-join-button
description: Fragment for opening the Microsoft Teams join page, entering meeting ID and passcode, and clicking the join button.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used no roles.

params.selector: input[pattern="[a-zA-Z\d\s]{9,}"], input[aria-label*="会議 ID" i], input[placeholder*="会議 ID" i], input[aria-label*="Meeting ID" i], input[placeholder*="Meeting ID" i]
input[pattern="[\d\w]+"], input[aria-label*="会議パスコード" i], input[placeholder*="会議パスコード" i], input[aria-label*="passcode" i], input[placeholder*="passcode" i]
button[type="submit"][aria-label*="Teams 会議に今すぐ参加します"], button[type="submit"].btn-primary, button:has-text("会議に参加する"), button:has-text("Join the meeting")
